questions.q: The 2026 World Cup kicks off today. Which country plays in the opening match?
Three countries are co-hosting the 2026 World Cup. Which three?
Mexico open the tournament today against which nation?
Who are the reigning world champions heading into 2026?
Which superstar captained Argentina to the 2022 World Cup title?
A bank paid a fortune to rename Mexico City's famous stadium 'Estadio Banorte' — but FIFA bans sponsor names at the World Cup. What is that stadium's famous original name?
FIFA made Haiti change their shirt just before the tournament because the design showed what kind of image?
How many teams are at the 2026 World Cup, the most ever?
Scotland are back at the World Cup after decades away. Famously, they have never managed to do what?
options: Qualify two tournaments in a row

questions.q: Where will the 2026 World Cup final be played, just outside New York?
Like the Azteca, MetLife Stadium has its name hidden by FIFA for the final. Why?
options: FIFA bans sponsor names at the World Cup
The stadium is still under construction
A legal dispute over the name
It is kept secret for security

questions.q: Which country has won the most World Cups, with five titles?
Which legend is the only player to win the World Cup three times?
Argentina beat which country on penalties in the 2022 World Cup final?
Players often struggle in Mexico City because its stadium sits at an extreme...?
Which host nation won the opening match of the tournament, beating South Africa 2-0?
The 2026 World Cup has three official mascots. The USA's mascot, Clutch, is which animal?
Canada's official World Cup mascot, Maple, is which animal?
Mexico's official World Cup mascot is a jaguar. What is it called?
Despite the three official animal mascots, a wide-eyed plush toy became an unlikely viral star after FIFA made it an official 2026 World Cup partner. What is it called?
Which Colombian pop superstar performed at the World Cup opening ceremony in Mexico City?
Which famous Mexico City stadium hosted the opening match and ceremony?
The bad-tempered opener between Mexico and South Africa saw the referee hand out three of what?
Mexico beat South Africa in the 2026 World Cup opener. What was the final score?
The opening game set an unwanted record. How many players were sent off in Mexico v South Africa?
After all those red cards, how many players did South Africa finish the opening match with?
Who scored the very first goal of the 2026 World Cup, inside ten minutes of the opener?
Which veteran striker scored Mexico's second goal in the 2-0 win over South Africa?
Hosts the USA hammered Paraguay 4-1 in their opener. How many goals did the USA score?
Co-hosts Canada were held to a draw by Bosnia and Herzegovina in their first game. What was the score?
South Korea opened with a 2-1 win on day one. Which European side did they beat?
Who are the reigning world champions heading into the 2026 World Cup?
Mexico's opening match was played at Mexico City's most famous stadium, known as the...?
Mexico opened the 2026 World Cup with a 2-0 win in Mexico City over which side?
The United States began their home campaign with a 4-1 win over which South American side?
Australia produced one of the opening round's biggest upsets, beating which side 2-0?
Alongside Folarin Balogun's brace, which playmaker was also on the scoresheet in the United States' 4-1 win over Paraguay?
The United States' 4-1 win over Paraguay was led by a brace from which striker?
Brazil were held to a 1-1 draw by Morocco. Who scored Brazil's equaliser?
Scotland beat Haiti 1-0 to go top of Group C, thanks to a deflected first-half strike from which midfielder?
Korea Republic recovered from a goal down to win their opener against which European side?
Co-hosts Canada were held to a 1-1 draw in their opening game by whom?
Switzerland dominated possession and shots but were pegged back to a 1-1 draw by which side?
Mexico's 2-0 win over South Africa, settled by Julian Quinones and Raul Jimenez, was marred by how many red cards?
Australia's surprise 2-0 win over Turkiye was opened by a 27th-minute goal from which young winger?
Which midfielder gave Morocco an early lead against Brazil before Vinicius Junior levelled?
Qatar's late equaliser against Switzerland was scored by which experienced campaigner?
Scotland's win over Haiti was their first at a World Cup since 1990. Which unwanted World Cup record do they hold?
options: Most appearances without ever reaching the knockout stage
Most red cards at a single World Cup

questions.q: World Cup debutants held the European champions to a goalless draw on Monday. Which nation pulled off the shock?
Cabo Verde's man of the match against Spain was their 40-year-old goalkeeper. By what name is he known?
Vozinha's clean sheet made him the third-oldest goalkeeper to keep one in a men's World Cup match. He trails only which two greats?
Spain laid siege to the Cabo Verde goal without reward. Roughly how many shots did they register across the 90 minutes?
Spain arrived in the United States as the reigning champions of which competition?
Germany began their campaign with a 7-1 win over which World Cup debutants?
Curacao are the smallest nation by population ever to reach a men's World Cup. Whose record did they take?
Curacao were beaten 7-1 by Germany but still made history in the match. Why?
options: They scored their first ever World Cup goal
They became the smallest nation to win a point
They conceded the fastest goal in tournament history

questions.q: Scotland beat Haiti 1-0 for their first World Cup win since which year?
Who scored the only goal of Scotland's win over Haiti?
Scotland's victory was their first at a World Cup since a 2-1 win over which nation in 1990?
Australia produced one of the early upsets, winning 2-0 against which side?
Sweden made the biggest statement in Group F, thrashing which side 5-1?
Brazil were held to a 1-1 draw in their opening match by which African side?
Monday's Group G games both finished level. Alongside Belgium 1-1 Egypt, Iran drew 2-2 with which side?
Which side recovered from conceding the opening goal to thrash World Cup debutants Curacao 7-1?
Who are the reigning world champions, due to begin the defence of their title this week?
Scotland celebrated their first World Cup win in 36 years. Which side did they edge 1-0?
Japan snatched a 2-2 draw with the Netherlands thanks to an 88th-minute equaliser. Who scored it?
Brazil were held to a 1-1 draw by Morocco. Which forward scored their equaliser?
Ivory Coast beat Ecuador 1-0 with a dramatic 90th-minute winner. Who scored it?
Sweden's 5-1 rout of Tunisia was their biggest haul in a single World Cup match since which tournament?
The United States opened with a 4-1 win over Paraguay. Which striker scored their two first-half goals?
Qatar claimed the first World Cup point in their history with a 1-1 draw against which European side?
France begin their campaign on Tuesday against an African side they famously lost to in the 2002 opener. Who?
In Germany's 7-1 win over Curacao, one forward scored twice, including a penalty. Who was it?
The USA sealed their 4-1 win over Paraguay with a stoppage-time strike curled in with the outside of the boot. Who scored it?
South Korea came from behind to beat Czechia 2-1. Which Czech captain had given his side an early lead?
The reigning champions open their title defence on Tuesday in Kansas City against which African nation?
Curacao stunned Germany by taking a shock early lead before collapsing. Which player scored that goal?
Lionel Messi scored a hat-trick as Argentina opened their campaign on Tuesday. What was the final score against Algeria?
Erling Haaland scored twice on his long-awaited World Cup debut on Tuesday. Which nation was he playing for?
France came from behind to beat Senegal 3-1. Which forward scored twice, including a long-range strike deep in stoppage time?
Messi's hat-trick took him to 16 World Cup goals, drawing him level with which player as the men's tournament's all-time leading scorer?
At 38, Messi surpassed Cristiano Ronaldo to become the oldest player ever to do what at a World Cup?
Mbappe's double made him France's all-time leading scorer with 58 goals, moving him past which striker on 57?
Norway's 4-1 win over Iraq was their first World Cup appearance since which tournament?
Miroslav Klose, whose World Cup goals record Messi equalled on Tuesday, won the trophy with which country in 2014?
The brace also took Mbappe past Just Fontaine as France's all-time World Cup scorer. How many World Cup goals does Mbappe now have?
Austria opened with a 2-1 win on a night that marked their opponents' first-ever World Cup appearance. Which debutants did they beat?
Norway's rout of Iraq was rounded off by a goal deep into second-half stoppage time. Who scored it?
Messi's hat-trick came at which Kansas City stadium, home to the NFL's Chiefs?
Haaland dragged Norway to the finals as the leading scorer of European qualifying, eight clear of anyone else. How many did he score in the campaign?
Mbappe broke Just Fontaine's France World Cup record, a tally of 13 goals set at a single tournament. In which year did Fontaine score them?
Tuesday's treble made Messi both the youngest and oldest goalscorer in Argentina's World Cup history. In which tournament did an 18-year-old Messi score his first World Cup goal?
Lionel Messi opened his sixth World Cup with his first-ever hat-trick at the tournament. Which side did Argentina beat 3-0 to begin their title defence?
Argentina arrived in 2026 as defending champions. Where did they lift the trophy in 2022?
Kylian Mbappe became which nation's all-time leading scorer during their opening 3-1 win over Senegal?
Messi's treble carried him to 16 World Cup goals, level with the tournament's all-time leading scorer. Who holds that record alongside him?
Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo share a new distinction in 2026. They are the first players ever to do what?
options: Appear at six different World Cups
Score at six different World Cups
Captain a side at six World Cups

questions.q: Mbappe's double against Senegal took him past Olivier Giroud at the top of France's scoring chart. What was his new national tally?
Erling Haaland scored twice on his long-awaited World Cup debut in a 4-1 Norway win. Who were the opponents, themselves back on the biggest stage after a 40-year wait?
The shock of the opening round saw World Cup debutants Cape Verde hold a heavyweight to a goalless draw. Which reigning European champions did they frustrate?
England began with a chaotic 4-2 win over Croatia. Who scored twice for the Three Lions, including an early penalty?
Ronaldo's sixth World Cup opened with a frustrating 1-1 draw. Which side earned their first-ever World Cup point against Portugal?
By starting against DR Congo at 41 years old, Ronaldo set which World Cup record?
options: Oldest outfield player to start a World Cup match
Oldest goalscorer in World Cup history
Oldest captain at a World Cup
Oldest player ever to appear at a World Cup

questions.q: Harry Kane's opener against Croatia was his 10th World Cup goal, drawing him level with England's tournament record holder. Who is that?
Mbappe broke the France record in spectacular fashion against Senegal. How did the milestone goal arrive?
options: A long-range strike deep in stoppage time

questions.q: Cape Verde's clean sheet against Spain owed much to a veteran goalkeeper who made a string of saves. Roughly how old is their hero, Vozinha?
Jude Bellingham's strike against Croatia made him only the third man to score at two different World Cups before turning 23. Which two legends were already in that group?
By taking the field against Algeria, Lionel Messi became the first man to appear at how many different World Cups?
Messi's hat-trick against Algeria took him to 16 World Cup goals, level with the tournament's all-time leading scorer. Who holds that record?
Argentina opened their title defence with a 3-0 win as Messi scored all three. Who were the opponents?
Kylian Mbappe's brace against Senegal saw him overtake which striker as France's all-time leading scorer?
France beat Senegal 3-1 in their opener, with one creative star named man of the match. Who was it?
England began their campaign with a 4-2 win over Croatia. Who captained the side and scored twice?
Which head coach led England to their opening win over Croatia?
Croatia were beaten 4-2, but their goalkeeper kept the game close with a string of saves. Who was he?
Which co-host claimed their first ever men's World Cup win, thrashing Qatar 6-0?
Who scored a hat-trick in Canada's 6-0 demolition of Qatar?
Canada's 6-0 win was the biggest in men's World Cup history by a team from which confederation?
Mexico became the first team to seal a place in the round of 32, beating South Korea 1-0. Who scored the only goal?
Switzerland scored four times late on to beat Bosnia and Herzegovina 4-1. Which substitute scored twice?
Colombia came from behind to beat Uzbekistan 3-1, with Daniel Munoz and Jaminton Campaz also scoring. Which star winger got the other goal?
Mbappe's heroics carried an echo of history: France's only opening-game defeat in their previous eight global tournaments came against Senegal. In which year?
The United States clinched a knockout-round place by beating Australia on Friday. What was the score?
Brazil's 3-0 win sent which nation home as the first team eliminated from World Cup 2026?
Morocco beat Scotland in Boston to take control of their group. What was the final score?
Who scored after just 70 seconds — the fastest goal of the tournament so far — to settle the Scotland game?
Brazil's two-goal hero against Haiti scored twice before Vinicius Junior added the third. Who was he?
The USA beat Australia despite missing their captain and talisman, ruled out by injury. Who sat it out?
Paraguay stunned Turkiye 1-0 with an early strike. Who scored the winner?
Friday's Brazil v Haiti and Scotland v Morocco fixtures were both played in the same group. Which one?
The USA's second goal against Australia was finished by a young defender after a VAR offside reversal. Who was it?
Scotland were aggrieved when a late penalty appeal was waved away. Which midfielder went down in the box?
Saibari's strike against Scotland made him the first Morocco player to achieve what?
options: Captain Morocco at a World Cup
Score in three different World Cups

questions.q: Paraguay held on to beat Turkiye with ten men after a first-half red card to which forward?
Who supplied the assist for Saibari's winner, lifting the ball over the Scotland defence?
Which Turkiye goalkeeper was beaten by Galarza's early goal as his side dominated possession but lost?
Brazil's win came under Carlo Ancelotti, the first foreign coach to lead them at a World Cup. As a manager, how many times has he won the Champions League — a record?
World Cup debutants Curacao earned their first ever point on Saturday with a goalless draw. Which side did they hold?
Curacao goalkeeper Eloy Room kept Ecuador out almost single-handedly. How many saves did he make in the 0-0 draw, one short of the World Cup single-match record?
Room finished a save short of the World Cup single-game record of 16, set in the 2014 round of 16 against Belgium. Which goalkeeper holds that record?
Curacao's appearance makes them the smallest nation by population ever to play at a men's World Cup. Which 2018 debutant had previously held that distinction?
From which confederation did Curacao, a Caribbean island side, qualify for the World Cup?
Germany came from behind to win 2-1 in Toronto on Saturday. Which side did they beat?
Germany's comeback was driven by a substitute who scored twice after coming on around the hour mark. Who was it?
Which Ivory Coast captain gave his side a shock first-half lead against Germany before Undav's late double turned the game?
The biggest win of the day was a 5-1 rout by the Netherlands. Which Scandinavian side did they put to the sword?
Two Dutch forwards scored braces in the win over Sweden: Cody Gakpo and which striker, who struck twice in the first half?
Brazil eased past Haiti 3-0 on the same day. Which forward scored twice for the Selecao?
Germany's victory booked their place in which stage of the expanded 48-team tournament?
Scotland were stunned by Morocco on Friday, losing 1-0 to an Ismael Saibari strike. How early did the goal come?
Curacao's gritty point against Ecuador came after a chastening tournament opener. What was the score in that first match against Germany?
The 2026 World Cup is being co-hosted by the United States, Canada and which other nation?
All three host nations have come through the opening two rounds unbeaten. Which trio is staging the 2026 World Cup?
The reigning world champions opened their defence with a controlled 3-0 win over Algeria. Who are they?
One side set the early benchmark for ruthlessness, hammering Curacao 7-1. Which nation was it?
The Netherlands followed a 2-2 draw with Japan by thrashing which side 5-1?
Among the favourites, Brazil dropped points in their opener, held to a 1-1 draw by which African side?
Morocco backed up that point by beating which returning nation 1-0 to share top spot in Group C with Brazil?
Canada delighted the home crowd with a 6-0 rout in Group B. Who were on the wrong end of it?
England began their campaign with a 4-2 win over which beaten 2018 World Cup finalists?
Spain looked laboured in a goalless opener before finding their rhythm with a 4-0 win over whom?
Which fancied side has stuttered to two draws so far, 1-1 with Egypt and 0-0 with Iran, leaving them third in Group G?
Japan recovered from their 2-2 draw with the Netherlands to beat Tunisia by what score?
France opened Group I with a 3-1 win over which African side, on a night Norway beat Iraq 4-1?
Switzerland kept pace with hosts Canada at the top of Group B thanks to a 4-1 win over which side?
Mexico sit top of Group A with two wins and no goals conceded. Having beaten South Africa 2-0, who did they then edge 1-0?
Before their own 5-1 defeat to the Netherlands, Sweden had won by that exact 5-1 scoreline. Which side did Sweden put five past?
Lionel Messi made history on Monday by becoming the all-time leading scorer in men's World Cup history. How many World Cup goals does he now have?
Messi's milestone moved him clear of which Germany striker, the previous men's World Cup record scorer?
Messi's double came in Argentina's 2-0 win over which side, a result that sealed top spot in Group J and a place in the knockouts?
Before his double, Messi missed an early chance to make the night even more emphatic against Austria. What happened?
options: He was shown a yellow card

questions.q: Messi arrived at Monday's game level with Klose on 16 World Cup goals thanks to what feat in Argentina's tournament opener against Algeria?
Monday's goals extended a remarkable run for Messi: he has now scored in how many consecutive World Cup matches dating back to 2022?
In Monday's late kick-off, Kylian Mbappe scored twice as France beat Iraq 3-0. That double drew him level with Klose on how many World Cup goals?
Mbappe's brace against Iraq was extra special, coming on what landmark occasion for the France captain?
Who scored France's other goal in the 3-0 win over Iraq that confirmed their place in the round of 32?
Erling Haaland scored twice to send Norway into the last 32 with a 3-2 win over which side?
Norway had to survive a scare as which Senegal forward scored twice, including a stoppage-time consolation?
By reaching 18 goals, Messi also passed the overall record across both World Cups, held by Brazil's Marta. On how many World Cup goals did Marta finish?
Algeria came from behind to beat Jordan 2-1 and stay in contention, with which forward grabbing the winning goal?
After Monday's matches, who led the race for the 2026 Golden Boot with five goals, one clear of Mbappe and Haaland?
Haaland's brace made him only the second player in the last 50 years to score multiple goals in each of his first two World Cup matches. Who was the first, in 2018?
Lionel Messi became the all-time leading goalscorer in men's World Cup history this week. Which nation does he captain?
Messi broke the all-time record with a brace in a 2-0 group-stage win over which European side?
Whose long-standing men's World Cup goalscoring record did Messi overtake? The previous holder was a striker from which country?
Messi now stands alone at the top of the men's World Cup scoring charts. How many career World Cup goals does he have after the Austria match?
Which Germany legend held the previous men's record of 16 World Cup goals that Messi has now surpassed?
Messi first drew level with the men's record by scoring a hat-trick in Argentina's tournament opener against which side?
Kylian Mbappe drew level with Klose on 16 World Cup goals after a brace in which group-stage match?
What was the final scoreline as France beat Iraq in that fixture?
Cristiano Ronaldo scored his first goal of the 2026 World Cup as Portugal thrashed which side 5-0 on June 23?
England were held to a goalless draw on June 23 by which African nation?
Mbappe reached a personal landmark in the Iraq game beyond his goals. What was it?
Messi's 18 also passed the overall World Cup goal record across the men's and women's tournaments. That mark of 17 was held by which player?
Klose set the previous men's record of 16 by surpassing a Brazilian striker who had scored 15. Who was that?
Messi arrived at the 2026 World Cup needing a strong run to reach the top. How many World Cup goals had he scored across all his previous tournaments combined?
At 38, Messi's hat-trick against Algeria carried an added distinction: he became the oldest player ever to do what at a World Cup?
options: Captain a side in the final
Be named player of the match

questions.q: Brazil sealed top spot in Group C on Wednesday with a 3-0 win over which side, leaving their World Cup hopes hanging by a thread?
Which Real Madrid forward scored both of Brazil's first two goals in the 3-0 win over Scotland?
Who came off the Brazil bench against Scotland to make his first appearance for the national team in roughly three years?
Tournament debutants Cape Verde produced one of the World Cup's great shocks by holding European champions Spain to a 0-0 draw. Which goalkeeper kept the clean sheet?
Mexico beat Czechia 3-0 at the Azteca to achieve which feat for the first time in their long World Cup history?
options: Keep three clean sheets in a group

questions.q: Coming off the bench against Czechia, 40-year-old Guillermo Ochoa featured at his sixth World Cup, joining which two players as the only men to appear at six?
A 1-0 win over South Korea booked which nation's place in the round of 32?
South Korea's hopes faded after head coach Hong Myung-bo made the controversial call to leave which captain out of his starting line-up?
Cristiano Ronaldo's brace in Portugal's 5-0 win over Uzbekistan made him the first player ever to score at how many different World Cups?
Ronaldo, scoring at 41, became the second-oldest goalscorer in World Cup history. Who remains the oldest, having struck for Cameroon at USA 94?
Croatia ground out a 1-0 win over Panama, the only goal coming from which striker?
Colombia edged DR Congo 1-0 thanks to a second goal in two games from which marauding full-back?
Morocco beat Haiti 4-2 but finished second in Group C, level on seven points with Brazil. What edged them out of top spot?
This is the first World Cup with 48 teams and a round of 32. How many of the third-placed sides across the 12 groups advance to that round?
Vinicius became only the fifth Brazilian to score in all three group matches at a World Cup. Which forward set the benchmark by scoring in every match of Brazil's victorious 1970 campaign?
Germany lost their final group game 2-1 to which South American side, who still squeezed into the round of 32?
Who scored Ecuador's 78th-minute winner to complete the comeback against Germany?
Germany led inside two minutes through a fierce strike from which winger, before Ecuador hit back?
Despite the defeat to Ecuador, where did Germany finish in Group E?
Hosts USA suffered their first defeat of the tournament, beaten 3-2 by Turkiye. The USA's opener came from a defender's first international goal. Which centre-back scored it?
Turkiye's equaliser against the USA was finished off by which 21-year-old Real Madrid playmaker?
Turkiye snatched a dramatic 3-2 win over the USA with a goal deep in stoppage time. Who scored that last-gasp winner?
The USA still topped Group D despite the loss. Which side, through as one of the best third-placed teams, awaits them in the round of 32?
Switzerland sealed top spot in Group B with a 2-1 win over which co-host nation?
The Netherlands won Group F with a 3-1 win over which winless side, as Japan and Sweden drew 1-1 to also progress?
Curacao bowed out in the group stage, ending the run of the smallest nation ever to reach a World Cup. Whose record had they broken to claim that tag?
Curacao's historic first World Cup was masterminded by which much-travelled Dutch head coach?
Ecuador reaching the knockouts is only the second time they have made it out of the group stage. In which year did they first do it?
The USA are co-hosting in 2026. The last time they staged the World Cup, in 1994, who lifted the trophy on American soil?
Turkiye's victory marked a long-awaited return to the finals. Before 2026, when did they last appear at a World Cup, a tournament in which they finished third?
France beat Norway 4-1 in Boston to finish their group with three wins from three. Who scored a first-half hat-trick?
Norway rotated heavily and left one striker on the bench against France, despite the crowd chanting his name. Who was it?
Their win over Norway confirmed France as winners of which group?
Norway were handed a second-half penalty against France but spurned it, the spot-kick saved by goalkeeper Mike Maignan. Who took the miss?
Who scored Norway's only goal against France, briefly pulling it back to 2-1?
Dembele arrived at the World Cup as the reigning Ballon d'Or holder. In which year had he won the award?
Belgium hammered New Zealand 5-1 to win their group. Which veteran playmaker was among the scorers?
Belgium's rout took top spot in Group G on goal difference. Which side went through as runners-up?
Iran thought they had snatched a stoppage-time winner against Egypt, only for the goal to be chalked off after a VAR review. Why?
options: The ball had gone out of play

questions.q: Spain edged top spot in Group H with a 1-0 win over which South American side?
Tournament debutants Cape Verde reached the knockout stage as Group H runners-up after a goalless draw with whom?
Senegal signed off the group stage in style with a 5-0 demolition of which side in Group I?
Group D winners the United States begin their round-of-32 campaign in Santa Clara against which nation?
Group F runners-up Japan drew a fearsome round-of-32 tie. Which five-time world champions await them?
In the new 48-team format, the top two from all 12 groups go through, joined by a set number of the best third-placed teams. How many third-placed sides advance to the round of 32?
The 2026 World Cup reaches its knockout stage today. Which tie opens the Round of 32?
This is the first World Cup to feature a Round of 32, a direct consequence of the tournament expanding to how many teams?
Who enter the knockout rounds as reigning world champions?
Under the 48-team format, the group runners-up are joined in the last 32 by how many of the best third-placed teams?
Reaching the last 32 on their tournament debut, which side became the smallest nation by population ever to make a World Cup knockout stage?
Cape Verde's reward for finishing runners-up in Group H is a Round of 32 tie in Miami against which opponent?
Ecuador beat Germany 2-1 on the final group day to sneak through as a best third-placed side. Despite the defeat, Germany still managed what?
options: Failed to score in the group

questions.q: Who struck in the 77th minute to complete Ecuador's comeback win over Germany?
Ivory Coast reached a World Cup knockout stage for the first time in their history, advancing as runners-up behind which group winners?
DR Congo reached the knockout rounds for the first time ever with a 3-1 comeback over Uzbekistan. Who awaits them in the Round of 32?
Which forward scored twice in DR Congo's comeback win over Uzbekistan?
A Riyad Mahrez double rescued a 3-3 draw that booked Algeria's place in the last 32. Which side did they draw with?
Algeria's late drama in that 3-3 draw bumped which nation out of the eight best third-placed places, ending their tournament?
Mexico topped Group A with a perfect record and now host a Round of 32 tie back at the Estadio Azteca. Who do they face?
Algeria scraped into the knockouts as a best third-placed team on how many points?
Canada have reached the knockouts as one of three host nations. Who are the other two co-hosts of the 2026 World Cup?
As the knockout rounds get going, who are the reigning world champions chasing back-to-back titles?
This is the first World Cup to stage a Round of 32, a consequence of the field expanding to how many teams?
Canada beat South Africa 1-0 in the opening Round of 32 tie. Who struck deep in stoppage time to win it?
Canada's captain made his tournament debut off the bench against South Africa, having sat out the group stage with a hamstring injury. Who is he?
Which American head coach guided Canada to that historic knockout win, the first manager to win a knockout match at this tournament?
Canada now go to the last 16 for the first time in their history. They will face the winner of which Round of 32 tie?
Alongside the twelve group winners and twelve runners-up, how many of the best third-placed teams advanced to fill the Round of 32?
Canada's win over South Africa, the tie that opened the last 32, was staged at which Los Angeles-area stadium?
Canada's only previous World Cup goals came in 2022. Against which nation did they score their first-ever World Cup goal?
Who scored that first-ever World Cup goal for Canada, a header in the opening minutes against Croatia in 2022?
Before this run, Canada had played at only two World Cups. They made their debut in which year, going home without a single goal?
Jesse Marsch had reached a World Cup last 16 before, as a United States assistant under Bob Bradley. At which tournament?
Among today's Round of 32 ties, four-time winners Germany are paired with which South American side?
Davies' first-ever World Cup goal for Canada against Croatia in 2022 was the fastest of that tournament. How quickly did he score?
Canada reached the World Cup knockout stage for the first time in their history. Which nation did they beat to do it?
Five-time world champions Brazil came from behind to win 2-1 in the last 32. Which nation did they knock out?
Paraguay eliminated four-time champions Germany in the Round of 32. How was the tie settled?
options: An own goal in extra time

questions.q: Who scored the 92nd-minute winner that sent Canada past South Africa and into the last 16?
Trailing Japan at half-time, Brazil turned it around late. Who scored their stoppage-time winner?
Japan led Brazil for much of the game thanks to a first-half opener. Which midfielder put them ahead?
Which manager saw his Germany side dumped out of the World Cup at the Round of 32?
Paraguay's shootout hero saved twice to knock out Germany. Which goalkeeper was it?
Who converted the decisive sudden-death penalty to complete Paraguay's stunning win over Germany?
On the same night Germany went out, Morocco eliminated which European heavyweight on penalties?
Who scored the goal that put the Netherlands ahead against Morocco before the Dutch were pegged back?
Morocco forced extra time with a stoppage-time equaliser against the Netherlands. Who headed it in?
Who slotted home the winning penalty as Morocco knocked the Netherlands out of the World Cup?
Germany's exit made them the first of the tournament's traditional heavyweights to fall. At which stage were they knocked out?
France continue their Round of 32 campaign today against which Nordic side?
Germany crashed out of the World Cup in the Round of 32, beaten on penalties by which unfancied side?
Which striker struck a late winner to send Norway past Ivory Coast and into the last 16?
France eased past Sweden 3-0 in the Round of 32, with which forward scoring twice?
Lionel Messi is now the outright all-time leading goalscorer in World Cup history. Which player did he overtake at the top of the list?
The all-time World Cup goals record that Messi has now surpassed had stood at how many goals?
